title: DevPilot Local Schema Catalog
purpose: Catalog of versioned JSON schemas registered by DevPilot. POST-H-002-A adds the MaturityDashboard contract for local, evidence-based maturity reporting without remote or production-overclaiming. POST-H-003-A adds the Test Contract Registry v2 design schema while preserving v1 compatibility. POST-H-004-A registers the MiasiSemanticReport contract for local, non-executing Policy/MIASI semantic validation reports. POST-H-005-A registers the ArchitectureMap contract for executable architecture inventory and dependency ownership baselines without running AST inventory yet. POST-H-007-B registers ApplicationOperationCatalog for declarative ApplicationService operation mapping, schema validation and test coverage metadata without changing runtime behavior. POST-H-008-A registers RuntimeStatePolicy and RuntimeStateInventory schemas for local lifecycle taxonomy, retention, clean ZIP hygiene and read-only inventory without enabling cleanup execution; POST-H-008-B expands RuntimeStateInventory for concrete scanner reports. POST-H-008-C registers RuntimeStateCleanupPlan for dry-run-first cleanup planning with explicit execute confirmation and source-of-truth never-delete safeguards. POST-H-009-A registers DocumentationSourceRegistry and DocumentationGovernanceReport schemas for local documentation governance, canonical source mapping and future drift validation without enabling LLM judge or remote documentation services. POST-H-010-A registers ObservabilityRetentionPolicy for local retention, rotation, redaction and clean ZIP hygiene defaults without enabling inventory, cleanup execution, remote export or external observability services. POST-H-010-E registers ObservabilityRetentionHygiene for local quality-gate integration of policy, inventory and clean ZIP checks without requiring runtime outputs, network or external APIs. POST-H-012-A registers SensitiveActionCatalog for local approval/RBAC hardening, sensitive action classification and blocked remote/plugin/connector execution without enabling dangerous capabilities. POST-H-012-C registers RbacExposureReport for local actor/role/action/interface exposure reporting across Identity Registry, SensitiveActionCatalog and MIASI policy matrix without enabling execution or mutating sources. POST-H-015-A registers OperatorDashboardSnapshot for the local read-only operator dashboard contract, mandatory source references and no-go flags before implementing the aggregator/API/UI.
